commands: echo '=== RDS: hostname, version, and active DB name ==='

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT @@hostname AS rds_host, @@version AS mariadb_version, DATABASE() AS current_database']"
echo '=== Table count in the site database ==='

docker exec -w /home/frappe/frappe-bench frappe_docker-backend-1 bench --site frontend execute frappe.db.sql --args "['SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_tables FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE()']"
echo '=== All established connections on the HOST to 3306 and 6379 ==='
ss -tnp state established | grep -E ':3306|:6379' || echo 'No active connections at this moment (MySQL is per-request)'
echo '=== Network: show ElastiCache and RDS private IPs from DNS ==='

getent hosts erpnext-poc-erpnextdb-ooorv168mrw1.c2diyosis802.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com && getent hosts erp-er-1lbcebhw7tt8c.dj78vm.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com && getent hosts erp-er-p9gezja7h2j8.dj78vm.0001.use1.cache.amazonaws.com
